## Summary

- What changed:
- Why it changed:

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run clean:generated`
- [ ] Relevant manual check completed

## Risk Review

- [ ] Shared routes / redirects were reviewed if URLs changed
- [ ] Shared metadata was updated instead of patching page-specific facts
- [ ] Legacy versions stayed minimal unless intentionally touched
- [ ] Ops docs or provider notes were updated if production behavior changed
